createdAccountOwner.description: Congratulations! Your account is now fully active. You can manage your company, add employees, configure services, and monitor bookings and payments.
createdAccountOwner.title: Your owner account has been confirmed! ✅

createdAccountUser.description: Congratulations! Your account is now fully active. You can freely use our platform - book services, manage your reservations, and enjoy all the features available to customers.
createdAccountUser.title: Your account has been confirmed! ✅

createdAccountWorker.description: Congratulations! Your employee account is now fully active. You can log in, start working, manage bookings, and use the available tools.
createdAccountWorker.title: Your account has been confirmed! ✅

createdSubscription.description: Thank you! Your subscription is pending confirmation and will be activated soon! Once it’s active, you’ll be able to enjoy all available features to the fullest. 😍
createdSubscription.title: Your subscription has been created! 🎉

setPassword.description: Your account was created using social login. To also be able to log in with a password, please set one now in your account settings.
setPassword.title: Set a password for your account
